milestones.title: M0 - Planning & GitHub setup
milestones.description: Plan approved, GitHub objects created, legacy branch tagged.

milestones.title: M2 - Data
milestones.description: Query layer, CSV import port, Person data.

milestones.title: M3 - Public site
milestones.description: Design system and all public routes.

milestones.title: M6 - Launch
milestones.description: Media ingest, production import, deploy validation.

issues.title: [E-Prime] #1 Repo bootstrap - legacy branch, tag, and empty scaffold
issues.body:
## Summary
Archive the v0 prototype and initialize E-prime on `main`.

## Tasks
- [ ] Tag current `main` as `v0-prototype`
- [ ] Create `legacy/v0` branch from tagged commit
- [ ] Reset `main` to minimal Next.js 15 + TypeScript scaffold
- [ ] Copy `prisma/schema.prisma` (switch to postgresql), `content/`, `docs/CSV_IMPORT.md`, `docs/E_PRIME_PLAN.md`, `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] Add `legacy/README.md` pointing to `legacy/v0` branch
- [ ] Verify `npm run build` passes

## Acceptance criteria
- `legacy/v0` preserves full prototype
- `main` builds with empty scaffold
- No feature code beyond copied schema/docs

## Agent
**A0 - Orchestrator**

## Blocks
All other E-prime issues

issues.title: [E-Prime] #2 Tech decisions - styling, auth library, storage driver
issues.body:
## Summary
Lock implementation choices before parallel agent work.

## Decisions required
- [ ] Styling: Tailwind vs CSS Modules (document in `docs/DECISIONS.md`)
- [ ] Auth: `iron-session` vs Jose-signed cookie
- [ ] Storage: local filesystem vs S3-compatible for V1
- [ ] Postgres: Docker Compose local vs hosted (Neon/Supabase)

## Acceptance criteria
- `docs/DECISIONS.md` committed with rationale
- `.env.example` reflects choices

## Agent
**A1 - Foundation**

## Depends on
#1

issues.title: [E-Prime] #3 Shared contracts - lib/data interfaces and types
issues.body:
## Summary
Define read-layer contracts consumed by Public and Admin agents.

## Tasks
- [ ] Document function signatures in `lib/data/index.ts` (stubs OK)
- [ ] Export shared types for Winner, Citation, Person, MediaAsset
- [ ] Agree revalidation path list for admin mutations

## Acceptance criteria
- A2, A3, A4 can work in parallel against documented contracts
- No implementation required beyond stubs

## Agent
**A0 - Orchestrator** (with A2 review)

## Depends on
#1

issues.title: [E-Prime] #4 PostgreSQL + Prisma setup
issues.body:
## Summary
Configure PostgreSQL and run initial Prisma migration from copied schema.

## Tasks
- [ ] Add `docker-compose.yml` with Postgres service (or document hosted URL)
- [ ] Update `schema.prisma` datasource to `postgresql`
- [ ] Run `prisma migrate dev` - initial migration
- [ ] Add `lib/db/prisma.ts` singleton
- [ ] Remove SQLite-specific paths from docs

## Acceptance criteria
- `npx prisma migrate status` clean on fresh clone
- `npx prisma studio` shows empty tables

## Agent
**A1 - Foundation**

## Depends on
#1, #2

issues.title: [E-Prime] #5 Authentication - login, session, bcrypt
issues.body:
## Summary
Implement production-grade admin authentication.

## Tasks
- [ ] bcrypt password verification (store hash in env or DB)
- [ ] Per-login signed session cookie with expiry
- [ ] `lib/auth/require-admin.ts` for server actions and routes
- [ ] `POST /api/auth/login` and `POST /api/auth/logout`
- [ ] Admin login page at `/admin/login`

## Acceptance criteria
- Valid login sets cookie; invalid rejected
- Logout clears session
- No static env-derived session hash

## Agent
**A1 - Foundation**

## Depends on
#2, #4

issues.title: [E-Prime] #6 Middleware - validate session on all admin paths
issues.body:
## Summary
Middleware cryptographically validates session, not just cookie presence.

## Tasks
- [ ] Matcher: `/admin/*`, `/api/admin/*`, `/api/auth/*` (except login)
- [ ] Reject invalid/expired tokens with redirect to login
- [ ] Unit tests for token validation helpers

## Acceptance criteria
- Forged cookie fails at middleware
- Valid session passes without page-level-only guard

## Agent
**A1 - Foundation**

## Depends on
#5

issues.title: [E-Prime] #7 Port CSV import script + dry-run tests
issues.body:
## Summary
Port `scripts/import-csv.ts` from legacy/v0 to work with PostgreSQL.

## Tasks
- [ ] Port script with identical CSV contracts
- [ ] `npm run import:csv -- --dry-run` works
- [ ] Vitest: dry-run does not persist rows
- [ ] Update `docs/CSV_IMPORT.md` if paths change

## Acceptance criteria
- Import against dev DB populates all entity types
- Dry-run test passes in CI

## Agent
**A2 - Data**

## Depends on
#4

issues.title: [E-Prime] #8 Implement lib/data query layer
issues.body:
## Summary
Implement all public read queries from contracts (#3).

## Tasks
- [ ] `getSiteOverview`, `getAwardPageData`, `getPaulFloodHistory`
- [ ] `getWinners` with filter params for search
- [ ] `getMediaAssets`, `getCitations`
- [ ] `getPerson` for Paul Flood biography
- [ ] Include evidence links + citations in queries

## Acceptance criteria
- Queries return correct shapes against imported data
- Unit tests for at least 3 query functions

## Agent
**A2 - Data**

## Depends on
#3, #4, #7

issues.title: [E-Prime] #9 Person import + Paul Flood biography content
issues.body:
## Summary
Activate the unused Person model with real Paul Flood content.

## Tasks
- [ ] Add `person.csv` or extend import for Person records
- [ ] Import Paul Flood biography (research from legacy CSVs / family input)
- [ ] `getPerson()` returns primary subject record

## Acceptance criteria
- Person row exists after import
- Bio content is production-ready (not placeholder)

## Agent
**A2 - Data**

## Depends on
#7

issues.title: [E-Prime] #10 Public design system + layout shell
issues.body:
## Summary
Memorial-quality public design - not dark admin aesthetic.

## Tasks
- [ ] `app/(public)/layout.tsx` - public nav, footer
- [ ] Design tokens: typography, color, spacing
- [ ] Responsive mobile nav (hamburger)
- [ ] Shared UI primitives in `components/ui/`
- [ ] Active route highlighting in nav

## Acceptance criteria
- Light, readable memorial feel with club imagery support
- Nav works at 375px width

## Agent
**A3 - Public**

## Depends on
#2, #3

issues.title: [E-Prime] #28 Launch - media ingest + production import
issues.body:
## Summary
Final launch gate - real content and media live.

## Tasks
- [ ] Ingest media files referenced in `media_assets.csv`
- [ ] Run production CSV import
- [ ] Verify V1 Definition of Done (`docs/E_PRIME_PLAN.md` §2)
- [ ] Tag release `v1.0.0`

## Acceptance criteria
- All 11 DoD items checked
- Site ready for public traffic

## Agent
**A6 - Deploy** (with all agents)

## Depends on
All M3–M5 issues
